Kumusta & Welcome

A seat at the family table

At Ditobi, dinner has always been a lively affair — big, comforting dishes set down in the middle of the table, everyone reaching across each other for their favourites. We built our whole menu around that feeling.

Order a spread, share your rice and sides, and try a little of everything. That's how it works at a Filipino table — and that's how we'd love you to eat with us.

"Filipino food made with love, tradition and just the right twist."
Signature Plates

Dishes worth crossing town for

A few favourites from our kitchen — the ones our Adelaide-Filipino regulars come back for again and again.

Char-grilled Favourite

Pinoy Barbecue Chicken

Marinated chicken thigh fillet, flame-grilled and served with java rice, ensalada and garlic vinegar — smoky, a touch sweet, and properly satisfying.

$26.50
Sizzling Platter

Sizzling Pork Sisig

Grilled pork jowl seasoned with our house-made dressing and served sizzling on a hot platter. Add an egg and let it melt right through.

$23.90
House Dessert

Ube Cake Slice

Layers of house-made ube sponge, ube jam and cream, masked in ube crumb — that nutty, vanilla-sweet purple you can't get anywhere else.

$9.90

The doors are open

Ditobi is now serving on Grote Street

Adelaide's Filipino food scene deserves a home, and we're proud to be it. Whether it's your first taste of Filipino food or a flavour of home you've been missing, there's a warm welcome and a full table waiting for you.

Plan your visit Browse the menu
Our Story

From Pampanga, with love

Ditobi began the way most good things do in a Filipino home — around a crowded table. Owner Jensen and his family grew up in Pampanga, the province often called the culinary capital of the Philippines, cooking with the flavours that raised them.

Many in Adelaide will already know the family from Sweet Lemon Patisserie on Unley Road — a much-loved spot they ran until 2024. After closing those doors, they took time to listen, reflect, and sharpen their vision. The answer was simple: give traditional Filipino cooking a place of its own.

So they reimagined the dishes they grew up with — keeping the soul of each recipe, but plating it with the care of a proper restaurant. A humble pork belly stew becomes a deconstructed Binagoongan, bright with pico de gallo. Ube turns dessert a glorious purple. Tradition, with just the right twist.

More than anything, Ditobi is about connection — family, hospitality, fresh ingredients and the kind of generous, home-style cooking that brings people together. We can't wait to share it with you.

— Jensen & the Ditobi family

Our Menu

Built for sharing

Order a range of dishes, place them in the middle, and let everyone grab a bit of everything. All prices in AUD.

Mains

Beef Pares$27.50

Rich braised beef stew served with garlic fried rice.

Crispy Pork Belly BinagoonganSignature$28.90

Roasted deep-fried pork belly, fried eggplant, sautéed shrimp paste with coconut milk and pico de gallo, served with white rice.

Pinoy Barbecue Chicken$26.50

Marinated chicken thigh fillet, java rice, ensalada, garlic vinegar.

Pinoy Barbecue Pork Belly$29.90

Marinated pork belly, java rice, ensalada, garlic vinegar.

Crispy Pata$37.90

Deep-fried pork hock served with ensalada, steamed white rice and soy vinegar.

Palabok$25.90

Rice noodles with shrimp and pork-infused sauce topped with boiled egg, pork crackling, steamed rice cake and calamansi (subject to availability).

Pinoy Style Burger Steak$25.90

2pcs grilled quarter pounder served with creamy mushroom sauce and white rice.

Crispy Pork Belly Kare-Kare$29.50

Fried pork belly with greens and eggplant in rich peanut sauce and shrimp paste, served with steamed white rice.

Sizzling Pork Sisig$23.90

Grilled pork jowl seasoned with house-made dressing, served on a sizzling platter (+$3 for egg).

Sizzling Tofu$22.90

Deep-fried tofu with house-made mayo dressing and capsicum, served on a sizzling platter.

Grilled Salmon$31.90

Grilled salmon, side broccolini, cheddar mashed potato, cream sauce with capers.

Bacon Cheese Burger$24.90

Quarter pounder, bacon strips, brioche buns, sliced cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions and tomato ketchup, served with chips and salad.

Crispy Chicken Burger$23.90

Crispy fried chicken, brioche buns, swiss cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions and tomato ketchup, served with chips and salad.

Starters

Fried Calamari with Aioli$14.50

Lightly battered calamari strips with sea salt and black pepper, served with garlic aioli.

Crispy Fried Chicken Wings6 / 12 / 18 pc

6pcs $13.50 · 12pcs $19.50 · 18pcs $25.50. Choice of sauce: Spicy Buffalo, Barbecue, Honey Soy or Mushroom Gravy.

Silogs

Add-ons for hot & cold drinks: Alternative milk — skim, almond, soy, oat or lactose-free (+$0.50) · Small scoop of vanilla ice cream (+$1.50) · Whipped cream (+$0.50)
Good to know: Order and pay at the counter, and please let our staff know of any dietary requirements. While many items are nut-free, dishes containing nuts are prepared in the same kitchen. A standard 1.5-hour dining time applies, especially when we're busy.
